text: In addition, the result of the present study supports previous studies, which did not find increased rates of first-born children among individual with OCD (20,31,34).

Organotypic hippocampal slice cultures
Interface hippocampal slice cultures were prepared as described previously (Stoppini et al. 1991; Boudkkazi et al. 2007; Debanne et al. 2008).
